description: War Room's skills marketplace. Per Loop 4 R6: separate skills/*.md files, lightweight registry, compatible with `npx skills add <repo>` pattern. Skills advertise triggers; the agent activates them on signal. Pre-flight selection picks 2-3 most likely skills per task.

skills.name: code-review
skills.purpose: Review a PR or diff for correctness, style, security, and tests.

skills.name: perspective-guided-research
skills.purpose: Apply STORM's multi-perspective questioning to a research question.

skills.name: incident-triage
skills.purpose: First 5 minutes of any incident. Severity, scope, immediate mitigation.

skills.name: codex-then-ollama
skills.purpose: Two-stage LLM call: codex for first draft, ollama qwen2.5:7b for independent second opinion. Cheaper than full council.

skills.name: council-vote
skills.purpose: Run a 3-stage council vote (parallel → anonymized rank → chairman). Reserve for strategic decisions.

skills.name: agent-soul-update
skills.purpose: Edit an agent's SOUL.md with a clear before/after diff, citing the new behavior.

skills.name: memory-add-fact
skills.purpose: Add a fact to the project memory bank. Auto-classifies trust tier.

skills.name: memory-recall
skills.purpose: Query the memory bank. Falls back to JSONL scan if no vector backend.
